## Checklist
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile vac.py decode_map.py` passes
- [ ] `./check_roborock_api.py` passes (if you touched `python-roborock` internals)
- [ ] No secrets/PII added (creds, tokens, IP/MAC/SSID, serials) — captures stay gitignored
- [ ] Protocol findings recorded in `DP_DICTIONARY.md` / `PROTOCOL.md`; capability changes in `CAPABILITIES.md`
- [ ] Anything that moves the robot was validated via `--dry-run` first
